title: Federation Delta Payload (FDEP)
description: Minimal deterministic change-set used for cross-instance CIR synchronization. This schema is strictly a transport format and MUST NOT introduce identity authority, inference logic, or validation decisions. All changes MUST correspond directly to CIR state transitions defined in the Asveora Unified Identity Model (AUIM).

delta_id.description: Unique identifier for this delta payload

source_instance.description: Origin Network Instance generating this delta

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when delta was generated

base_snapshot_id.description: Optional reference to the snapshot this delta is derived from

changes.description: Ordered list of deterministic CIR state changes. Each entry MUST map directly to a CIR field mutation as defined in AUIM. No inferred or derived transformations are permitted.

cir_id.description: Target CIR identifier affected by this change

change_type.description: Type of deterministic CIR state change

field_path.description: Dot-notation path of the CIR field being updated. Required for FIELD_UPDATE changes.

old_value.description: Previous value prior to change application. Must match CIR state at base snapshot time.

new_value.description: New value after deterministic application of change. Must conform to AUIM constraints.

reason_code.description: Optional machine-readable reason for change (audit only)

registry_context.description: Non-authoritative synchronization metadata used for observability only. MUST NOT influence CIR state or validation decisions.

commit_reference.description: Optional reference to registry commit lifecycle event
